products.name: The Gladstone Tweed Blazer
products.description: A structured, single-breasted blazer tailored from heavy Yorkshire tweed wool. Designed with high armholes, clean canvased front chests, and dual rear vents reflecting classical English field jackets. Modernized through a sharp, contemporary silhouette.
products.care_instructions: Professional dry clean only. Brush down with a soft clothes brush to clean. Store in a cool, dry wardrobe on a structured oak hanger.
products.meta_description: A tailored single-breasted tweed jacket crafted from heavy Yorkshire wool. Features modern English lines.

products.name: The Heather Slip Dress
products.description: An elegant bias-cut dress crafted from heavy sand-washed silk. Featuring an understated cowl neck and a deep cowl back. Inspired by wild heather fields in Scotland, dyed a deep thistle-mauve color.
products.care_instructions: Dry clean only. Steam gently. Do not wring or tumble dry.
products.meta_title: The Heather Silk Slip Dress - Thistlewood
products.meta_description: Discover the Heather silk slip dress. Bias-cut styling with signature cowl detail in thistle-mauve.

products.name: The Shetland Cable Sweater
products.description: A thick, traditional cable-knit sweater made from un-dyed Shetland wool. Features a rugged crew neck, drop shoulders, and organic ribbed hems. Designed for a comfortable fit that provides exceptional warmth.
products.care_instructions: Hand wash cold with wool detergent. Dry flat. Never hang while wet.
products.meta_description: Traditional cable-knit crewneck sweater crafted from un-dyed Shetland wool.

products.name: The Savile Pleated Trouser
products.description: High-rise pleated trousers tailored in heavy wool flannel from English mills. Cut with a fluid wide leg, adjustable side tabs, double pleats, and a classic cuffed hem for a clean, sharp break.
products.care_instructions: Professional dry clean only. Steam or press with a damp pressing cloth.
products.meta_title: The Savile Pleated Flannel Trouser - Thistlewood
products.meta_description: Tailored high-rise double-pleated flannel trousers with side adjustments and cuffed hems.

products.name: The Yorkshire Storm Coat
products.description: A double-breasted heavy trench coat tailored from water-repellent English gabardine wool. Features structural storm flaps, hand-sewn buttonholes, horn buttons, and a belted waist. Built to withstand elements with uncompromising sophistication.
products.care_instructions: Dry clean only. Hang on a wide hanger in a breathable garment bag.
products.meta_title: The Yorkshire Storm Wool Trench Coat - Thistlewood
products.meta_description: A double-breasted gabardine wool storm coat with protective storm flaps.

products.name: The Wessex Linen Shirt
products.description: A minimalist band-collar shirt cut from organic Irish linen. Features a button-through front with mother-of-pearl buttons, a single chest pocket, and clean French seams. Soft, breathable, and structured.
products.care_instructions: Wash cold on gentle cycle. Hang to dry. Iron damp for a crisp look, or wear wrinkled for character.
products.meta_description: Classic band-collar Irish linen shirt with French seams and mother-of-pearl buttons.

products.name: The Wessex Tweed Vest
products.description: A tailored heritage vest made from fine Yorkshire tweed wool.
